message:
feat(vector): wire vector index into search path and add doctor checks

- Update VectorIndexCache.load() to use load_from_file_or_storage() for
  faster semantic search startup (tries file first, falls back to DB)
- Add index_path parameter to load_vector_index_cached() and call sites
- Add check_vector_index_health() function for xf doctor command
- Doctor checks: file existence, size validation, record count consistency
- Update cache tests to use new 4-tuple return from create_storage()
- Improve embedding generation with parallel processing and larger chunks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
